title: Atlassian Rovo MCP Server Setup
description: Atlassian Rovo MCP Server setup documents client setup material for the Atlassian Rovo MCP Server in the agent domain. It is classified as an operation page for the mcp-server class, so readers can configure Codex, Gemini CLI, and Claude Code with the streamable HTTP MCP endpoint, choose the correct token authentication mode, test Confluence access, and troubleshoot startup errors. Important search terms include atlassian, rovo, mcp, codex, gemini, claude code, confluence, jira, api token, and agent, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent setup material. The route is agent / mcp / atlassian-rovo-mcp / setup, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation.
